svg.text: Leaf sensors + power (page 2 — add for deployment, NOT for the radio test)
POWER — no built-in rails, tie them:
The Freenove has only ONE 3V3 and ONE GND pin.
2. From there hop 3V3 on to PIR, then BME280.
3. Do the same chain for GND.
signals still go to their own GPIOs.
- These are NOT needed for the first radio test.
- PIR OUT is 3.3V-safe straight into GPIO21.
